CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-26-2016 AT 10:30 AM. Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No sanctions. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
